title: micranthemum longipes
intro: Micranthemum longipes, also known as long-stalked dwarf cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species native to North and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Micranthemum longipes include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
